requirement_topic.en: EMC and Radio Interface — Refrigerator Electronics in Myanmar
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容及无线接口——缅甸冰箱电子部件
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容及無線介面——緬甸冰箱電子部件

summary.en: Myanmar does not operate an EU-style horizontal EMC self-declaration system for ordinary household refrigerators. MSTRD may reference MS standards aligned with IEC/CISPR publications for electrical products, and conformity documentation can be requested by buyers, projects, or customs channels, but standards are largely voluntary unless the product category is specifically brought into a conformity-documentation requirement. Smart refrigerators or models with Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, or other radio modules additionally need MPT radio or type-approval review before import and sale. Non-radio refrigerators should keep EMC test evidence for conducted and radiated disturbances as part of the importer technical file.
summary.zh: 缅甸没有针对普通家用电冰箱的欧盟式横向 EMC 自我声明制度。MSTRD 可引用与 IEC/CISPR 对应的 MS 标准作为电气产品技术依据，采购方、项目或通关渠道可能要求提供符合性文件，但除非特定产品类别被纳入符合性文件要求，标准大多为自愿性。带 Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝或其他无线模块的智能冰箱，在进口及销售前还需要接受 MPT 无线电或型号批准审查。非无线冰箱也应在进口商技术文件中保留传导和辐射骚扰测试证据。
summary.zht: 緬甸沒有針對普通家用電冰箱的歐盟式橫向 EMC 自我聲明制度。MSTRD 可引用與 IEC/CISPR 對應的 MS 標準作為電氣產品技術依據，採購方、項目或通關渠道可能要求提供符合性文件，但除非特定產品類別被納入符合性文件要求，標準大多為自願性。帶 Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂窩或其他無線模組的智能冰箱，在進口及銷售前還需要接受 MPT 無線電或型號批准審查。非無線冰箱也應在進口商技術文件中保留傳導和輻射騷擾測試證據。

standards_or_laws: MSTRD MS standards aligned with IEC/CISPR EMC publications for household electrical products — voluntary unless required for a regulated category or procurement
Myanmar Telecommunications Law (2013) and MPT type approval procedures — required for products incorporating radio modules

summary.en: China refrigerator compliance is commonly built around GB 4706.13 for appliance safety and GB 12021.2 for refrigerator energy performance, with EMC evidence commonly prepared against GB 4343.1 and harmonic-current requirements where applicable. China CCC documentation and CNAS reports support China domestic placement but do not automatically become Myanmar MSTRD or MPT approvals.
summary.zh: 中国冰箱合规通常以 GB 4706.13 电器安全和 GB 12021.2 冰箱能效为基线，EMC 证据通常按 GB 4343.1 及适用的谐波电流要求准备。中国 CCC 文件和 CNAS 报告支持中国国内投放，但不会自动转化为缅甸 MSTRD 或 MPT 批准。
summary.zht: 中國冰箱合規通常以 GB 4706.13 電器安全和 GB 12021.2 冰箱能效為基線，EMC 證據通常按 GB 4343.1 及適用的諧波電流要求準備。中國 CCC 文件和 CNAS 報告支持中國國內投放，但不會自動轉化為緬甸 MSTRD 或 MPT 批准。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers
GB 12021.2 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators
GB 4343.1 — Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus

gap.en: For non-wireless refrigerators, the Myanmar EMC gap is mainly documentary: keep EMC evidence available, but there is no confirmed universal Myanmar EMC market-entry mark equivalent to CE-EMC. For smart refrigerators, the gap becomes mandatory because China SRRC or module approvals are not accepted by MPT; a separate Myanmar radio/type-approval file is required. Confirm whether the specific model and HS code trigger any MSTRD conformity-documentation request at Yangon/Thilawa or Mandalay overland entry.
gap.zh: 对非无线冰箱而言，缅甸 EMC 差距主要是文件性差距：应保留 EMC 证据，但尚未确认存在等同于 CE-EMC 的缅甸统一强制市场准入标志。对智能冰箱而言，差距变为强制性，因为中国 SRRC 或模块批准不被 MPT 直接接受；须另行准备缅甸无线电/型号批准文件。应确认具体型号及 HS 编码在仰光/迪拉瓦或曼德勒陆路入境时是否触发 MSTRD 符合性文件要求。
gap.zht: 對非無線冰箱而言，緬甸 EMC 差距主要是文件性差距：應保留 EMC 證據，但尚未確認存在等同於 CE-EMC 的緬甸統一強制市場准入標誌。對智能冰箱而言，差距變為強制性，因為中國 SRRC 或模組批准不被 MPT 直接接受；須另行準備緬甸無線電/型號批准文件。應確認具體型號及 HS 編碼在仰光/迪拉瓦或曼德勒陸路入境時是否觸發 MSTRD 符合性文件要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mostly voluntary for non-radio refrigerators; mandatory MPT type approval if the refrigerator includes Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, or other radio modules
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in China through the refrigerator CCC and GB documentation baseline where applicable; SRRC mandatory for radio modules

source.publisher: Ministry of Transport and Communications / MPT, Republic of the Union of Myanmar

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Standard non-wireless refrigerators should retain EMC evidence for Myanmar buyer and customs due diligence, but no universal Myanmar EMC mark is confirmed. Smart refrigerators with radio modules require separate MPT approval; Chinese SRRC or CCC files do not substitute.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 标准非无线冰箱应保留 EMC 证据，以供缅甸采购方和海关尽职调查使用，但尚未确认存在统一的缅甸 EMC 标志。带无线模块的智能冰箱须单独取得 MPT 批准；中国 SRRC 或 CCC 文件不能替代。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 標準非無線冰箱應保留 EMC 證據，以供緬甸採購方和海關盡職調查使用，但尚未確認存在統一的緬甸 EMC 標誌。帶無線模組的智能冰箱須單獨取得 MPT 批准；中國 SRRC 或 CCC 文件不能替代。
